# StatusServicesBackgroundTaskBackgroundTask_Launchd_DeviceManagementObject

**Object**

A dictionary that indicates a [doc://com.apple.devicemanagement/documentation/DeviceManagement/ServicesBackgroundTasks] configuration created this background task. The dictionary contains properties that identify the configuration and the declaration asset that provided the launchd plist for the task.

## Declaration

```swift
object StatusServicesBackgroundTaskBackgroundTask_Launchd_DeviceManagementObject
```
